Preview:

Love was the last thing on Saiki's mind. Keyword: was. He never thought he would ever get into a relationship. Romance, love, it was all just a complication that he didn't need in his life. It was nothing but a distraction, something that he didn't need to entertain. It was so easy for him to just read people up like an open book. Every thought, every decision, every plan, nothing is a secret. It's why he didn't want friendships either. It was easy to predict how things would play out. It was easy to sit back and constantly be a road ahead of everyone else.
creator: DaintyBouquet
